ruleExplore.bookList:
<js>
let list = [];
let resultData = JSON.parse(result);

let targetData = resultData.data || resultData.list || resultData.book_list || 
                resultData.publication_list || resultData.result || resultData;
                
if (targetData != null && targetData.book_shelf_info) {
    let bookIds = targetData.book_shelf_info.map(item => `{"book_id": "${item.book_id}"}`).join(',');
    
    let booksData = java.ajax(
`https://fanqienovel.com/api/bookshelf/multidetail,{"method": "post","body": {"books":[${bookIds}]}}`
        );
    
    let books = JSON.parse(booksData).data.detail_list;
    for (let i in books) {
        let d = books[i];
        list.push({
            src: d,
            book_name: d.book_name,
            author: d.author,
            category:d.category,
            tags:d.tags,
            word_number:d.word_number,
            lastChapterTitle: d.last_chapter_title,
            abstract: d.abstract,
            book_id: d.book_id,
        });
    }
} else {
    list = targetData.content || targetData;
}

JSON.stringify({data: list})
</js>

}
cache.put(java.md5Encode16(Get('url') + "headers"),JSON.stringify(headers));
JSON.stringify(headers);

exploreUrl:
<js>
eval(String(source.loginUrl));
var exploreUrl = [];
Account = (cache.get(java.md5Encode16(Get('url') + "Account_1")) && String(cache.get(java.md5Encode16(Get('url') + "Account_1"))).length > 0) ? cache.get(java.md5Encode16(Get('url') + "Account_1")) : Map('账号：');
if(String(Account).length > 0) {
    if (cookie.getCookie(Get('url')).includes('auth=')) {
        login(Put(JSON.stringify('【登录提示】\n\n┏┅━┅━┅━┅━┅━┅━┅━┅━┅┓\n┋┋' + '\n账号：' + Account + '\n┋┋' + '\n❤️登录成功❤️\n┋┋' + '\n┗┅━┅━┅━┅━┅━┅━┅━┅━┅┛')));
    } else {
        Login();
    }
    if(cache.get(java.md5Encode16(Get('url') + "Account_1")) && String(cache.get(java.md5Encode16(Get('url') + "Account_1"))).length > 0) {
        exploreUrl.push(explore('✣【' + Account + '】✣', '', 1, 1, false));
        exploreUrl.push(explore('我的收藏', `{{Get('url')}}/plugin.php?id=jameson_manhua&c=index&a=store&page={{page}}`, 1, 0.45, false));
        exploreUrl.push(explore('阅读记录', `{{Get('url')}}/plugin.php?id=jameson_manhua&c=index&a=store&type=lishi&page={{page}}`, 1, 0.45, false));
    }
}
title = '✣　　　　　  ✣  标　　签  ✣  　　　　　✣';
J = org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(java.ajax(Get('url')));
type = J.select('[data-field="category_id"]');
exploreUrl.push(explore(title, '', 1, 1, false));
Jindu = `{{get('jindu',Get('o'))}}`;
Shuxing = `{{get('shuxing',Get('p'))}}`;
Odfie = `{{get('odfie',Get('q'))}}`;
for (j in type) {
    url = `{{Get('url')}}/plugin.php?id=jameson_manhua&c=index&a=ku${String('&category_id=' + type[j].attr('data-value')).replace(/&category_id=empty/, '')}${Jindu}${Shuxing}&odfie=${Odfie}&page={{page}}`;
    exploreUrl.push(explore(type[j].text(), url, 1, 0.2, false));
}
BID = (type.length % 4) < 1 ? 0 : (4 - (type.length % 4));
for (i = 0; i < BID; i++) {
   exploreUrl.push(explore('', '', 1, 0.2, false)); 
}
//exploreUrl.splice(90, 0, explore('', '', 1, 0.2, false));
JSON.stringify(exploreUrl);
</js>

ruleExplore.bookList:
<js>
let list = [];
let resultData = JSON.parse(result);

let targetData = resultData.data || resultData.list || resultData.book_list || 
                resultData.publication_list || resultData.result || resultData;
                
if (targetData != null && targetData.book_shelf_info) {
    let bookIds = targetData.book_shelf_info.map(item => `{"book_id": "${item.book_id}"}`).join(',');
    
    let booksData = java.ajax(
`https://fanqienovel.com/api/bookshelf/multidetail,{"method": "post","body": {"books":[${bookIds}]}}`
        );
    
    let books = JSON.parse(booksData).data.detail_list;
    for (let i in books) {
        let d = books[i];
        list.push({
            src: d,
            book_name: d.book_name,
            author: d.author,
            category:d.category,
            tags:d.tags,
            word_number:d.word_number,
            lastChapterTitle: d.last_chapter_title,
            abstract: d.abstract,
            book_id: d.book_id,
        });
    }
} else {
    list = targetData.content || targetData;
}

JSON.stringify({data: list})
</js>

ruleContent.content:
<js>
// 假设 result 变量已包含 HTML 字符串
var document = org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(result);

var preElements = document.select('div#content-section.content-section > pre');
if (preElements.isEmpty()) {
    result = '未找到 div#content-section.content-section > pre 元素';
} else {
    var preElement = preElements.first();
    var innerHtml = preElement.html();
    
    // 定义转换函数（注意：在 Rhino 中使用 var 或 function）
    function convertHtmlToPlainTextWithLineBreaks(html) {
        var text = html;
        text = text.replaceAll(" ", " ");
        text = text.replaceAll("(?i)<p[^>]*><\\/p>", "\n");
        text = text.replaceAll("(?i)<p[^>]*>(.*?)<\\/p>", "\n$1\n");
        text = text.replaceAll("(?i)<br\\s*\\/?>", "\n");
        text = text.replaceAll("<[^>]+>", "");
        text = text.replaceAll("\\n{3,}", "\n\n");
        return text.trim();
    }
    
    // 调用函数，获取纯文本
    var plainText = convertHtmlToPlainTextWithLineBreaks(innerHtml);
    result = plainText;
}
</js>

<js>
let list = [];
let resultData = JSON.parse(result);

let targetData = resultData.data || resultData.list || resultData.book_list || 
                resultData.publication_list || resultData.result || resultData;
                
if (targetData != null && targetData.book_shelf_info) {
    let bookIds = targetData.book_shelf_info.map(item => `{"book_id": "${item.book_id}"}`).join(',');
    
    let booksData = java.ajax(
`https://fanqienovel.com/api/bookshelf/multidetail,{"method": "post","body": {"books":[${bookIds}]}}`
        );
    
    let books = JSON.parse(booksData).data.detail_list;
    for (let i in books) {
        let d = books[i];
        list.push({
            src: d,
            book_name: d.book_name,
            author: d.author,
            category:d.category,
            tags:d.tags,
            word_number:d.word_number,
            lastChapterTitle: d.last_chapter_title,
            abstract: d.abstract,
            book_id: d.book_id,
        });
    }
} else {
    list = targetData.content || targetData;
}

JSON.stringify({data: list})
</js>

<js>
var bes = result.match(/PHA\+[A-Za-z0-9+\/]+={0,2}/g);
//java.log(String(bes))
if (!bes) {
    var ml = java.webView(null,baseUrl,null);
    var txt = java.getString(".word_read@p@html");
    java.longToast("正文解密失败，转为webView动态加载。");
} else {
var result = [];
for (var i = 0; i < bes.length; i++) {
    // 遍历数组，使用阅读内置Base64解码方法
    var bsej = java.base64Decode(bes[i]);
    var txtt = String(bsej);
    result.push(txtt);
      }
	var txt = result.join('\n');
}
txt;
</js>

<js>
(() => {
	try {
		data = JSON.parse(source.getVariable())
	} catch (err) {
		data = {}
	}
	sessionID = data.sessionID||"";
	if (!sessionID) {
		chars = "abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz123456789";
		charsLength = chars.length
		for (i = 0; i < 26; i++) {
			sessionID += chars.charAt(Math.floor(Math.random() * charsLength))
		}
		data.sessionID = sessionID
		source.setVariable(JSON.stringify(data))
	}
	return JSON.stringify({
		"cookie": "PHPSESSID=" + sessionID,
		"User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 13_3_1 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/605.1.15 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/13.0.5 Mobile/15E148 Snapchat/10.77.5.59 (like Safari/604.1)"
	})
})()
</js>

<js>
function loading(){
var su=source.getKey(),
sk=java.get("sk"),
q="?q="+java.encodeURI(sk);

var c="Hm_lvt_="+~~(Date.now()/1e3);
var head={
	accept: "application/json",
	"accept-language": "zh-CN,en-US;q=0.9",
	referer: baseUrl,
	cookie: String(c)
};

var hm=";hm="+java.head(su+"/user/hm.html"+q,head).cookies().hm;
head.cookie = String(head.cookie+hm);

var get=java.get(su+"/user/search.html"+q, head).body();

var j=JSON.parse(get),
m=j.map(_=>JSON.stringify(_));

var b=[],
v=source.getVariable();
//条件判断，存在不为空和0，且小于长度
if(v&&v!=""&&v!=0&&v<m.length){
	for(i=0;i<=v-1;i++){
		b.push(m[i])
		}
	m=b;
	}else{m=m}
//返回列表
return m
}
//当前url包含json为发现，直接返回结果
m=/json/.test(baseUrl)?result:loading();
//不包含json为搜索，进行搜索加载
m
</js>

<js>
function getParams(params,isPost){
 let desKey = Packages.java.lang.String('ZUreQN0Epkpxh3pooWOgixjTfPwumCTYWzYTQ7SMgDnqFLQ1s9tqpVhkGf02we89moQwhSQ07DVzc3LWupRgbVvm29aYeY7zyFN').getBytes('UTF_8')
 let des = Packages.cn.hutool.crypto.symmetric.DES("ECB","PKCS5Padding", desKey)
 let md5Key = 'NpkTYvpvhJjEog8Y051gQDHmReY54z5t3F0zSd9QEFuxWGqfC8g8Y4GPuabq0KPdxArlji4dSnnHCARHnkqYBLu7iIw55ibTo18'
 let timestamp = Date.now()
 let requestId = java.randomUUID().replace('-','')
 let param = des.encryptBase64(JSON.stringify(Object.assign(params,{'timestamp': timestamp})))
 let sign = String(java.digestHex(java.base64Encode(`param=${param}&requestId=${requestId}&timestamp=${timestamp}&key=${md5Key}`),'md5')).toUpperCase()
 let data = JSON.stringify({
    param: param,
    requestId: requestId,
    sign: sign,
    timestamp: timestamp
 })
 return isPost? JSON.stringify({ method: "POST", body: data }) :`timestamp=${timestamp}&requestId=${requestId}&sign=${sign}&param=${encodeURIComponent(param)}`
}
let style1 = {"layout_flexGrow": 0,"layout_flexBasisPercent": 1}
let style2 = {"layout_flexGrow": 0.25,"layout_flexBasisPercent": -1}
let style3 = {"layout_flexGrow": 0,"layout_flexBasisPercent": 0.29}
let findList = [{"title": "༺个人中心༺ ","url": '',"style": style1},{"title": "每日签到","url": `/api/ciyuanji/client/sign/sign,${getParams({},true)}`,"style": style2},{"title": "个人书架","url": `/api/ciyuanji/client/bookrack/getUserBookRackList?${getParams({"pageNo":1,"pageSize":9999},false)}`,"style": style2}]
findList.push({"title": "༺男生分类༺ ","url": '',"style": style1})
// bookType: 1 代表男生. bookType: 4 代表女生
// 获取男生分类
res = JSON.parse(java.ajax(`/api/ciyuanji/client/classify/getBookClassifyListByParams?${getParams({"classifyId":0,"pageNo":1,"pageSize":99,"bookType":"1"},false)}`))
res.data.classifyList.forEach(o=> {
  let params1 = getParams({"firstClassify":o.classifyId,"rankType":"1","pageNo": 1,"pageSize": 30,"bookType":"1"},false)
  findList.push({"title": o.classifyName, "url": `/api/ciyuanji/client/book/getBookListByParams?${params1}`,"style": style1})
  let len =  o.childList.length
  len>1&&o.childList.forEach((c,i)=>{
  	   let params2 = getParams({"firstClassify":o.classifyId,"rankType":"1","pageNo": 1,"pageSize": 30,"bookType":"1","secondClassify":c.classifyId},false)
  	  let style=i==len-1?style3:style2
    findList.push({"title":c.classifyName, "url": `/api/ciyuanji/client/book/getBookListByParams?${params2}`,"style":style})
  	})
})
// 获取男生标签
findList.push({"title": "༺ 男生标签༺","url": '',"style": style1})
res = JSON.parse(java.ajax(`/api/ciyuanji/client/tag/getAppTagList?${getParams({"pageNo":1,"pageSize":99,"bookType":"1"},false)}`))
let tagLen =  res.data.list.length
res.data.list.forEach((o,i)=> {
  let params = getParams({"tagId":o.tagId,"rankType":"1","pageNo": 1,"pageSize": 30,"bookType":"1"},false)
  let style=i==tagLen-1?style3:style2
  findList.push({"title": o.tagName, "url": `/api/ciyuanji/client/book/getBookListByTagId?${params}`,"style": style})
})
JSON.stringify(findList)

loginUrl:
<js>
var username = String(source.getLoginInfoMap().get("手机号"))
var passwd = String(source.getLoginInfoMap().get("验证码"))
// 工具类
var md5Key = 'NpkTYvpvhJjEog8Y051gQDHmReY54z5t3F0zSd9QEFuxWGqfC8g8Y4GPuabq0KPdxArlji4dSnnHCARHnkqYBLu7iIw55ibTo18'
var desKey = Packages.java.lang.String('ZUreQN0Epkpxh3pooWOgixjTfPwumCTYWzYTQ7SMgDnqFLQ1s9tqpVhkGf02we89moQwhSQ07DVzc3LWupRgbVvm29aYeY7zyFN').getBytes('UTF_8')
var des = Packages.cn.hutool.crypto.symmetric.DES("ECB","PKCS5Padding", desKey)
if(!username) throw new Error("请输入手机号")
// 发送验证码
if(username != 0 && passwd == 0) {
  let timestamp = Date.now()
  let requestId = java.randomUUID().replace('-','')
  let param = des.encryptBase64(JSON.stringify({phone: username,smsType: "1",timestamp: timestamp}))
  let sign = String(java.digestHex(java.base64Encode(`param=${param}&requestId=${requestId}&timestamp=${timestamp}&key=${md5Key}`),'md5')).toUpperCase()
  let data = JSON.stringify({
    param: param,
    requestId: requestId,
    sign: sign,
    timestamp: timestamp
  })
  let op = JSON.stringify({ method: "POST", body: data })
  let res = JSON.parse(java.ajax(`https://api.hwnovel.com/api/ciyuanji/client/login/getPhoneCode,${op}`))
  if(res.code != '200') throw new Error(res.msg)
  java.toast("验证码已发送，请输入验证码登录")
}
// 验证码登录
if(username != 0 && passwd != 0) {
  let timestamp = Date.now()
  let requestId = java.randomUUID().replace('-','')
  let param = des.encryptBase64(JSON.stringify({phone: username,phoneCode: passwd,timestamp: timestamp}))
  let sign = String(java.digestHex(java.base64Encode(`param=${param}&requestId=${requestId}&timestamp=${timestamp}&key=${md5Key}`),'md5')).toUpperCase()
  let data = JSON.stringify({
    param: param,
    requestId: requestId,
    sign: sign,
    timestamp: timestamp
  })
  let op = JSON.stringify({ method: "POST", body: data})
  let res = JSON.parse(java.ajax(`https://api.hwnovel.com/api/ciyuanji/client/login/phone,${op}`))
  if(res.code != '200') throw new Error(res.msg)
let userInfo = res.data.userInfo source.putLoginHeader(JSON.stringify({ "token": userInfo.token}))
  java.toast("登陆成功")
}
</js>

}

ruleBookInfo.author: author
ruleBookInfo.init:
<js> 
var J = org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(result);
var o = selector => String(J.select(selector).text()) ;
var og = selector => String(J.select('[property="og:' + selector + '"]').attr('content'));
var book = {
	name: og('novel:book_name').replace(/(全文|小说|免费阅读|最新章节).*|[(（].*[）)]/g, ''),
	author: og('novel:author'),
	kind: og('novel:category') + ',' + og('novel:status').replace(/中|已/, ''),
wordCount: o('.layui-bg-red').replace(/\s+万字/,'万'),
	latest: og('novel:latest_chapter_name').replace(/^(正文|VIP章节|最新章节)?(\s+|_)|[\(（【].*[求更谢乐发推].*/g, ''),
	intro: '　　最近更新:' + og('novel:update_time').replace(/(T|\s).*/, ' ').replace(/\//g, '-') + '\n' + o('.intro p:eq(0)').replace(/.*(观看小说|简介)[:：]|各位书友.*/g, '').replace(/\s+/g, '\n'),
	cover: og('image'),
	url: og('novel:read_url').replace('m.','www.'),
};
book;
</js>
ruleBookInfo.name: name

head = {
	accept: "application/json",
	"accept-language": "zh-CN,en-US;q=0.9",
	referer: String(h+"s"+q),
	cookie: String(c)
}

hm = ";hm="+java.head(h+"user/hm.html"+q, head).cookies().hm;
head.cookie = String(head.cookie+hm);

Get = java.get(h+"user/search.html"+q, head);
JSON.parse(Get.body())
.map(_=>JSON.stringify(_));
</js>

<js>
//选择分类
all = [0]
/*
全部板块 0
教程分享 1   问答|悬赏 2  技术交流 3    休闲娱乐 4  书荒推书 5  其他资源 6
	*/

搜索=source.getVariable();
if(搜索=="1"){
		搜索 = "srchuname="+key+"&srchtxt="
		}else{
			搜索 ="srchtxt="+key+"&srchuname="
			}

fenlei = ["all","43","44","42","46","45","51"]
srchfid = "";
for(i in all){
	srchfid+="srchfid%5B%5D="+fenlei[all[i]]+"&"
	}
	key = Packages.java.net.URLEncoder.encode(key,"utf-8");
(()=>{
	srchfid = srchfid==""?"srchfid%5B%5D=all":srchfid
  let base='/search.php?mod=forum';
  if(page==1){
   let  body = 搜索+"&srchfilter=all&srchfrom=0&before=&srhlocality=forum::index&ascdesc=desc&"+srchfid+"&searchsubmit=yes";
   
cookies = String(cookie.getCookie(""));
cache.put('surl',java.post(base,body,{"Cookie":cookies}).header("Location"),300);
    return cache.get('surl');
  } else {
    return cache.get('surl')+'&page='+page;
  }
})()
</js>

                video = decodeURIComponent(Get('url') + java.encodeURI(list[i].sources[0].file));
                java.put('Image' + link, image);
                java.put('Video' + link, video);
                if (source.bookSourceType == 1) {
                    link = `${video},{"webView":true}`;
                }
                vol = list[i].sources[0].type + ' ' + list[i].sources[0].height + 'x' + list[i].sources[0].width + ' ' + list[i].sources[0].label;
                order = title.match(/(\d+)/);
                title = Get('settle') == true ? String(title).replace(/\s共.*?图/, '').replace(/(-|_|\s-\s)/g, ' ').replace(/\s-\s|-/g, ' ').replace(/\s+/, ' ').replace(/.*第(\d+)[话話章回期](|\s)第.*?[话話章回期]/, '$1').replace(/.*第(\d+)[话話章回期][^\s]/, '$1 ').replace(/.*第(\d+)[话話章回期]\s\d+/, '$1').replace(/.*第.*(\d+).*?[话話章回期]/, '$1').replace(/(\d+)/, title.match(/\d+/) ? order[1].padStart(3, '0') : '$1') : title;
                data.push({

                    'vol': vol,
                    'vip': false
                });
            }
        } else {
        var $2 = element => String(java.getElements(element).text());

            'title': $2('.breaker-breaker.0'),
            'link': baseUrl,
            'vol': '',
            'vip': false
        });
        }
    }
    data = JSON.stringify(data);
} else {

}

        e = String(java.s2t(e)).replace(/TC/, '');
    }
    var search = Get('s') == 0 ? '?' : '?service_backend=fts&';
    var sort = Get('r') == 0 ? '' : java.encodeURI(get('sort',Get('p')));
    var sort_1 = Get('r') == 0 ? '' : get('sort_1',Get('p'));
    var client_url = '/search?query=' + e + sort;
    java.put(java.md5Encode16(Get('url') + "searchkey"), e);
    return Get('url') + '/services/search/beta/page_production/' + search + 'user_query=' + java.encodeURI(e) + '&hits_per_page=20&page={{page}}&filter_map=' + filter_map('s') + sort_1 + '&aggregations=false&client_url=' + java.encodeURI(client_url);
}(key));
</js>

ruleBookInfo.init:
<js>
$ = java.getString(".infoWen@html");
n = 0; 
v = String(book.getVariable("custom"));
x = v.match(/^\d+$/)? v : n;
x = parseInt(x) < $.length? x : n;
java.toast(x);

img = java.getString('[property="og:image"]@content');

if (v == 1) {
  bookUrlz = java.getString('source@src');
} else if(v==0){
  bookUrlz = baseUrl;
}

intro = "  简介：" + java.getString('[property="og:description"]@content') + "\n当前源链: " + bookUrlz+"\n文本简介:🔺'+0+'🔻"+baseUrl+
"\n音频链接:🔺'+1+'🔻"+java.getString('source@src');
data = {
  intro: intro,
  img: img,
  bookUrl: bookUrlz
};

JSON.stringify(data);
</js>

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
let list = [];
if (baseUrl.match(/audio/)) {
  book.type = 32;
  java.toast('已自动开启听书模式');
} else if (baseUrl.match(/huiben/)) {
  book.type = 64;
  java.toast('已自动开启漫画模式');
} else if (baseUrl.match(/g/)) {
  book.type = 8;
  java.toast('已自动开启小说模式');
}
let obj = {
  text: java.get('name'), 
  href:baseUrl
};
list.push(obj);
list
</js>

}

header:
<js>
(() => {
	try {
		data = JSON.parse(source.getVariable())
	} catch (err) {
		data = {}
	}
	sessionID = data.sessionID||"";
	if (!sessionID) {
		chars = "abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz123456789";
		charsLength = chars.length
		for (i = 0; i < 26; i++) {
			sessionID += chars.charAt(Math.floor(Math.random() * charsLength))
		}
		data.sessionID = sessionID
		source.setVariable(JSON.stringify(data))
	}
	return JSON.stringify({
		"cookie": "PHPSESSID=" + sessionID,
		"User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 13_3_1 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/605.1.15 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/13.0.5 Mobile/15E148 Snapchat/10.77.5.59 (like Safari/604.1)"
	})
})()
</js>

header:
<js>
(() => {
	try {
		data = JSON.parse(source.getVariable())
	} catch (err) {
		data = {}
	}
	sessionID = data.sessionID||"";
	if (!sessionID) {
		chars = "abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz123456789";
		charsLength = chars.length
		for (i = 0; i < 26; i++) {
			sessionID += chars.charAt(Math.floor(Math.random() * charsLength))
		}
		data.sessionID = sessionID
		source.setVariable(JSON.stringify(data))
	}
	return JSON.stringify({
		"cookie": "PHPSESSID=" + sessionID,
		"User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 13_3_1 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/605.1.15 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/13.0.5 Mobile/15E148 Snapchat/10.77.5.59 (like Safari/604.1)"
	})
})()
</js>

header:
<js>
(() => {
	try {
		data = JSON.parse(source.getVariable())
	} catch (err) {
		data = {}
	}
	sessionID = data.sessionID||"";
	if (!sessionID) {
		chars = "abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz123456789";
		charsLength = chars.length
		for (i = 0; i < 26; i++) {
			sessionID += chars.charAt(Math.floor(Math.random() * charsLength))
		}
		data.sessionID = sessionID
		source.setVariable(JSON.stringify(data))
	}
	return JSON.stringify({
		"cookie": "PHPSESSID=" + sessionID,
		"User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 13_3_1 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/605.1.15 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/13.0.5 Mobile/15E148 Snapchat/10.77.5.59 (like Safari/604.1)"
	})
})()
</js>

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
  let defaultVariable = {
    "volume": {
      "status": false,
      "mode": 1,
      "spacer": " | ",
      "emptyVolumeName": {
        "action": false,
        "replace": "第一卷：默认"
      },
      "onlyOneShow": false
    }
  }
  let variable = (book.getVariable("custom") != "" && book.getVariable("custom") != null) ? book.getVariable("custom") : source.getVariable();
  if(variable != "" && variable != null){
    try{
      variable = JSON.parse(variable);
    } catch(err) {
      java.log(err);
      variable = defaultVariable;
    }
  } else {
    variable = defaultVariable;
  }
  let data = JSON.parse(result).data;
  let list = data.chapterListWithVolume;
  let volume = data.volumeNameList;
  let chapters = [];
  let volume_names = [];
  for(let i in list){
    for(let x in list[i]){
      let c = list[i][x];
      if(variable.volume.status == true && variable.volume.mode == 1 && volume_names.indexOf(c.volume_name) == -1){
        volume_names.push(c.volume_name);
        if(volume.length != 1 || variable.volume.onlyOneShow){
          chapters.push({
            title: ((c.volume_name == "" && variable.volume.emptyVolumeName.action == "replace" && variable.volume.emptyVolumeName.replace) ? variable.volume.emptyVolumeName.replace : c.volume_name),
            isVolume: true
          });
        }
      }
      if(variable.volume.status == true && variable.volume.mode == 2){
        if(c.volume_name == "" && variable.volume.emptyVolumeName.action == "replace" && variable.volume.emptyVolumeName.replace){
          c.title = (c.volume_name == "" ? variable.volume.emptyVolumeName.replace : c.volume_name) + (variable.volume.spacer || " | ") + c.title;
        } else if(volume.length != 1 || variable.volume.onlyOneShow){
          c.title = c.volume_name + (variable.volume.spacer || " | ") + c.title;
        }
      }
      c.url  = source.bookSourceUrl +  `/content?item_id=${c.itemId}`;
      chapters.push(c);
    }
  }
  chapters
</js>

<js>
function reurl(a){var b='';var c=csplit(a,8).split('\r\n');for(var i=0;i<(c.length-1);i++){b=b+String.fromCharCode((parseInt(c[i],2)-10).toString(10))}return b}

function csplit(a,b,c){b=parseInt(b,10)||76;c=c||'\r\n';if(b<1){return false}return a.match(new RegExp(".{0,"+b+"}","g")).join(c)}

r=result.match(/(reurl[^)]+\))/)[1]
s=eval('('+r+')')
result="magnet:?xt=urn:btih:"+s
</js>

<js>
let config = (() => {
    try {
        let cfg = JSON.parse(source.getVariable())[0] || {};
        if (!cfg.host || !cfg.gender) {
            cfg = {gender: "boy", host: getServerHost()};
            source.setVariable(JSON.stringify([cfg]));
            java.toast("配置初始化完成");
        }
        return cfg;
    } catch(e) {
        let cfg = {gender: "boy", host: getServerHost()};
        source.setVariable(JSON.stringify([cfg]));
        return cfg;
    }
})();
    
let rawVariable = source.getVariable();
let 个人中心 = 1;
let obj = (title, url, type) => ({
  title: title,
  url: url,
  style: { layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: type }
});

let sort = [];
let push = (title, url, type) => sort.push(obj(title, url, type));

let currentType = "";
let currentSource = "";
try {
  let vArray = JSON.parse(rawVariable);
  if (vArray.length > 0) {
    let v = vArray[0];
    currentType = v.gender || "";
    currentSource = v.source || "";
  }
} catch(e) {
  currentType = "";
  currentSource = "";
}

const getGenderDisplayName = (gender) => {
  if (gender == "boy") return "男频";
  if (gender == "girl") return "女频";
  return "";
};

const genderDisplay = getGenderDisplayName(currentType);

push(`当前为【${currentSource || "番茄小说"}】${genderDisplay ? `【${genderDisplay}】` : ''}`, "", 1);

if (currentSource == "晋江") {
	   sort.push({
        title: "📝点击签到",
        url: `${getServerHost()}/jj_signin`,
        style: { layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.29 }
    });
    
    sort.push({
        title: "📂我的收藏",
        url: `${getServerHost()}/jjbookshelf?token=`,
        style: { layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.29 }
    });
}

const excludedSources = ["小说", "听书", "漫画", "视频", "短剧", "音频","番茄小说"];

if (currentSource && !excludedSources.includes(currentSource)) {
  try {
    let apiUrl = `${getServerHost()}/type_api?source=${currentSource}`;
    if (currentType) {
      apiUrl += `&gender=${currentType}`;
    }
    
    let response = JSON.parse(java.ajax(apiUrl));
    
    if (response.data && response.data.found) {
      response.data.found.forEach(item => {
        let finalUrl = "";
        if (item.url) {
          finalUrl = `${getServerHost()}/type_api?source=${currentSource}&page={{page}}&url=${item.url}`;
          if (currentType) {
            finalUrl += `&gender=${currentType}`;
          }
        }
        sort.push({
          title: item.title,
          url: finalUrl,
          style: item.style || { layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.29 }
        });
      });
    } else {
      push(`【${currentSource}】${genderDisplay ? `【${genderDisplay}】` : ''}暂无数据`, "", 1);
    }
  } catch(e) {
    push(`【${currentSource}】${genderDisplay ? `【${genderDisplay}】` : ''}暂无数据`, "", 1);
  }
  JSON.stringify(sort);
} else {
  let recommendUrl = getServerHost() + "/read_recommend?session=" + getSessionId();
    let guessUrl = getServerHost() + "/read_guess?session=" + getSessionId();
    push('个性推荐', recommendUrl, 0.45);
    push('猜你喜欢', 'https://fanqienovel.com/tab/cai', 0.45);
    push('巅峰榜单', 'https://fanqienovel.com/api/author/misc/top_book_list/v1/?limit=100&offset={{(page-1)*100}}', 0.29);
  push('出版榜单', 'https://fanqienovel.com/api/node/publication/list?page_index={{(page-1)*100}}&page_count=100', 0.29);
  push('爆更榜单', 'https://api-lf.fanqiesdk.com/api/novel/channel/homepage/rank/rank_list/v2/?aid=13&limit=50&offset={{(page-1)*100}}&side_type=15&type=1', 0.29);
  push('黑马榜单', 'https://api-lf.fanqiesdk.com/api/novel/channel/homepage/rank/rank_list/v2/?aid=13&limit=50&offset={{(page-1)*100}}&side_type=13&type=1', 0.29);
  push('热搜榜单', 'https://api-lf.fanqiesdk.com/api/novel/channel/homepage/rank/rank_list/v2/?aid=13&limit=50&offset={{(page-1)*100}}&side_type=12&type=1', 0.29);

  let showCategories = currentType == "girl" ? [0] : [1];
  
  showCategories.forEach(genderCode => {
    let isMale = genderCode == 1;
    let genderLabel = isMale ? "男频" : "女频";
    
    let categories = isMale ? [
      {id: 1141, name: "西方奇幻"},
      {id: 1140, name: "东方仙侠"},
      {id: 8, name: "科幻末世"},
      {id: 261, name: "都市日常"},
      {id: 124, name: "都市修真"},
      {id: 1014, name: "都市高武"},
      {id: 273, name: "历史古代"},
      {id: 27, name: "战神赘婿"},
      {id: 263, name: "都市种田"},
      {id: 258, name: "传统玄幻"},
      {id: 272, name: "历史脑洞"},
      {id: 539, name: "悬疑脑洞"},
      {id: 262, name: "都市脑洞"},
      {id: 257, name: "玄幻脑洞"},
      {id: 751, name: "悬疑灵异"},
      {id: 504, name: "抗战谍战"},
      {id: 746, name: "游戏体育"},
      {id: 718, name: "动漫衍生"},
      {id: 1016, name: "男频衍生"}
    ] : [
      {id: 1139, name: "古风世情"},
      {id: 8, name: "科幻末世"},
      {id: 746, name: "游戏体育"},
      {id: 1015, name: "女频衍生"},
      {id: 248, name: "玄幻言情"},
      {id: 23, name: "种田"},
      {id: 79, name: "年代"},
      {id: 267, name: "现言脑洞"},
      {id: 246, name: "宫斗宅斗"},
      {id: 539, name: "悬疑脑洞"},
      {id: 253, name: "古言脑洞"},
      {id: 24, name: "快穿"},
      {id: 749, name: "青春甜宠"},
      {id: 745, name: "星光璀璨"},
      {id: 747, name: "女频悬疑"},
      {id: 750, name: "职场婚恋"},
      {id: 748, name: "豪门总裁"},
      {id: 1017, name: "民国言情"}
    ];
    
    push(`❤️${genderLabel}阅读榜❤️`, "", 1);
    
    categories.forEach(cat => {
      sort.push({
        title: cat.name,
        url: `${getServerHost()}/style_top?rank_list_type=3&offset={{(page-1)*10}}&limit=10&category_id=${cat.id}&gender=${genderCode}&rankMold=2`,
        style: { layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.29 }
      });
    });
    
    push(`❤️${genderLabel}新书榜❤️`, "", 1);
    
    categories.forEach(cat => {
      sort.push({
        title: cat.name,
        url: `${getServerHost()}/style_top?rank_list_type=3&offset={{(page-1)*10}}&limit=10&category_id=${cat.id}&gender=${genderCode}&rankMold=1`,
        style: { layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.29 }
      });
    });
  });

  let fqCategoryArr = [];
showCategories = currentType == "girl" ? [0] : [1];

showCategories.forEach(i => {
  try {
    let response = JSON.parse(java.ajax(`${getServerHost()}/type_style?new_category_tab=${i}`));
    let categoryGroups = response.data;
    
    categoryGroups.forEach(group => {
      fqCategoryArr.push(obj(`❤️${group.name}❤️`, null, 1));
      
      group.data.forEach(category => {
        let gender, genre_type;
        if (i == 0) {
          gender = 0;
          genre_type = 0;
        } else if (i == 1) {
          gender = 1;
          genre_type = 0;
        } else {
          gender = 1;
          genre_type = 0;
        }
        
        fqCategoryArr.push({
          title: category.name,
          url: `${getServerHost()}/type_style?category_id=${category.category_id}&genre_type=${genre_type}&gender=${gender}&offset={{(page-1)*100}}&selected_items=`,
          style: {
            layout_flexGrow: 1,
            layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.29
          }
        });
      });
    });
  } catch (e) {
    fqCategoryArr.push(obj("分类加载失败，请重试", null, 1));
  }
});

  fqCategoryArr.forEach(item => {
    if (item.style && item.style.layout_flexBasisPercent) {
      push(item.title, item.url, item.style.layout_flexBasisPercent);
    } else {
      sort.push({
        title: item.title,
        url: item.url,
        style: {
          layout_flexGrow: 1,
          layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.29
        }
      });
    }
  });

  let hasValidSession = false;
  let username = "";

  try {
    let uinfo = java.ajax(getServerHost() + "/book_user?session=" + getSessionId());
    uinfo = JSON.parse(uinfo);
    
    if (uinfo.data.name) {
      username = uinfo.data.name;
      hasValidSession = true;
    }
  } catch (e) {
  }

  if (!hasValidSession) {
    java.toast("番茄登录已过期，请重新登录");
  }

  let gro = [];
  let pushGro = (title, url, type) => gro.push(obj(title, url, type));

  let sArr = [];

  if (hasValidSession) {
    try {
      let book_shelf_info = JSON.parse(java.ajax(getServerHost() + "/book_shelf?session=" + getSessionId()));

      if (book_shelf_info.code == 0) {
        个人中心 = 1;
        
        let groups_bookids = { "未分组": [] };
        book_shelf_info.data.book_shelf_info.forEach(i => {
          if (!groups_bookids[i.group_name ? i.group_name : "未分组"]) 
            groups_bookids[i.group_name] = [];
          groups_bookids[i.group_name ? i.group_name : "未分组"].push(i.book_id);
        });

        Object.keys(groups_bookids).forEach(k => {
          pushGro(k, "https://fanqienovel.com/fqbookshelf/groupName/" + k, 0.4);
        });
        if (Object.keys(groups_bookids).length % 2 != 0) pushGro("占位", "", 0.4);
        
        sArr.push(obj(username + '的个人中心', '', 1));
        sArr.push(obj("我的书架", "https://fanqienovel.com/fqbookshelf", 1));
        sArr = sArr.concat(gro);
        sArr.push(obj("阅读历史", getServerHost() + "/read_history?session=" + getSessionId() + "&page={{page}}", 1));
      } else {
        个人中心 = 0;
        java.toast("获取书架信息失败，登录可能已过期");
      }
    } catch (e) {
      个人中心 = 0;
      java.toast("番茄登录过期，已隐藏个人中心");
    }
  } else {
    个人中心 = 0;
    java.toast("您还未登录番茄账号，无法同步数据");
  }

  sort = sArr.concat(sort);
  JSON.stringify(sort);
}
</js>

ruleExplore.author: $.author
ruleExplore.bookList:
<js>
function getBookIdFull(url) {
    const {java} = this;
    let $ = JSON.parse(url).data;
    let arr = [];
    if ($.book_shelf_info && $.book_shelf_info.length > 0) {
        arr = $.book_shelf_info.map(item => item.book_id);
    } else if ($.data_list && $.data_list.length > 0) {
        arr = $.data_list.map(item => item.book_id_str);
    } else {
        java.toast("获取 book_id 失败，你可能需要登录！");
    }
    return arr;
}

let session = getSessionId()

getShelf = () => {
    let book_shelf_info = java.ajax(getServerHost() + "/book_shelf?session=" + session)
    
    bid = getBookIdFull(book_shelf_info)
    
    let id_list = splitArray(bid, 200)
    let urls = []
    id_list.forEach(i => {
        urls.push(getServerHost() +"/detail?book_id=" + i.join(","))
    })
    res = java.ajaxAll(urls)

    let resp = {book_info: []}
    res.forEach(r => {
        resp.book_info = resp.book_info.concat(JSON.parse(r.body()).data)
    })

    return resp
}

function getByGroupName(name) {
    let book_shelf_info = JSON.parse(java.ajax(getServerHost() +"/book_shelf?session=" + session))
    
    let group_bookids = {
        "未分组": []
    }
    book_shelf_info.data.book_shelf_info.forEach(i => {
        if (!group_bookids[i.group_name ? i.group_name : "未分组"]) group_bookids[i.group_name] = []
        group_bookids[i.group_name ? i.group_name : "未分组"].push(i.book_id)
    })
    
    if (!group_bookids[decodeURIComponent(name)]) return {data: []}
    
    let book_ids = splitArray(group_bookids[decodeURIComponent(name)], 200)
    let urls = []

    book_ids.forEach(i => { 	urls.push(getServerHost() +"/detail?book_id=" + i.join(","))
    })
    
    res = java.ajaxAll(urls)

    let resp = {book_info: []}
    res.forEach(r => {
        resp.book_info = resp.book_info.concat(JSON.parse(r.body()).data)
    })

    return resp
}

function getByTabIndex(index) {
    let url = _mlsec.requestHeader(
        "bookmall/tab",
        "version_name=5.8.9.32",
        null,
        "sessionid=" + session
    )
    let all = JSON.parse(java.ajax(url))
    let tab = all.data.tab_item[0].cell_data[index].cell_data
    if (!tab) tab = []
    let bookList = []
    for (let i of tab) {
        bookList = bookList.concat(i.book_data)
    }
    return { book_info: bookList }
}

function getGuessYouLike() {
    let apiUrl = 'https://reading.snssdk.com/reading/bookapi/bookmall/tab/v/?version_name=5.8.9.32&device_id=1024&device_type=114514&iid=2048&aid=1967&channel=0&os_version=0&app_name=novelapp&version_code=58932&device_platform=android'
    let response = java.ajax(apiUrl + ', ' + JSON.stringify({
        headers: {
            'Cookie': "sessionid=" + session
        }
    }))
    let responseData = JSON.parse(response)
    let finalResult = {
        code: 0,
        message: 'SUCCESS',
        data: {
            cell_view: {
                book_data: []
            }
        }
    }
    if (responseData && responseData.data && responseData.data.tab_item && responseData.data.tab_item.length > 0 && responseData.data.tab_item[0].cell_data && responseData.data.tab_item[0].cell_data.length > 0 && responseData.data.tab_item[0].cell_data[0].cell_data && responseData.data.tab_item[0].cell_data[0].cell_data.length > 0 && responseData.data.tab_item[0].cell_data[0].cell_data[0].book_data) {
        finalResult.data.cell_view.book_data = responseData.data.tab_item[0].cell_data[0].cell_data[0].book_data
    }
    return finalResult
}

function normalizeResponse(data) {
    if (data.data && data.data.book_list && Array.isArray(data.data.book_list)) {
        return data.data.book_list;
    }
    
    if (data.book_info) return data.book_info;
    if (data.data && data.data.book_info) return data.data.book_info;
    if (data.data && Array.isArray(data.data)) return data.data;
    if (data.list) return data.list;
    if (data.book_list) return data.book_list;
    if (data.data && data.data.publication_list) return data.data.publication_list;
    if (data.result) return data.result;
    if (data.data && data.data.result) return data.data.result;
    if (data.data && data.data.cell_view && data.data.cell_view.book_data) {
        return data.data.cell_view.book_data;
    }
    if (data.data && data.data.records) return data.data.records;
    if (data.data && data.data.list) return data.data.list;
    
    return [];
}

if (baseUrl.includes("type_style")) {
    let sortKey = getSortKey() || '';
    let newUrl = baseUrl + sortKey;
    result = JSON.parse(java.ajax(newUrl));
    
    let normalizedData = normalizeResponse(result);
    JSON.stringify({data: normalizedData});
} else if (baseUrl.endsWith("bookshelf")) {
    result = getShelf("bookshelf/info")
} else if(/read_history/.test(baseUrl)) {
    let pageMatch = baseUrl.match(/page=(\d+)/);
    let page = pageMatch ? pageMatch[1] : '1';
    
    let history_response = java.ajax(getServerHost() + "/read_history?session=" + session + "&page=" + page)
    let history_data = JSON.parse(history_response)
    
    if (history_data.data.data_list) {
        let book_ids = history_data.data.data_list.map(item => item.book_id_str)
        
        let id_list = splitArray(book_ids, 200)
        let urls = []
        id_list.forEach(i => {
          urls.push(getServerHost() +"/detail?book_id=" + i.join(","))
        })
        
        let resp = {book_info: []}
        urls.forEach(url => {
            let detailResponse = java.ajax(url)
            let detailData = JSON.parse(detailResponse)
            if (detailData.data) {
                resp.book_info = resp.book_info.concat(detailData.data)
            }
        })
        
        result = resp
    } else {
        result = {book_info: []}
    }
} else if (baseUrl.includes("style_top")) {
    result = JSON.parse(result);
} else if (baseUrl.includes("/tab/cai")) {
    result = getGuessYouLike();
} else {
    let w = baseUrl.split("/")
    if (baseUrl.includes("groupName")) {
        result = getByGroupName(w[w.length - 1])
    } else if (baseUrl.includes("tab")) {
        result = getByTabIndex(parseInt(w[w.length - 1]))
    } else {
        result = JSON.parse(result)
        if (result.data && result.data.data) {
            result = {book_info: result.data.data}
        }
    }
}

if (!baseUrl.includes("type_style")) {
    let normalizedData = normalizeResponse(result);
    JSON.stringify({data: normalizedData})
}
</js>

ruleExplore.bookUrl:
<js>
let source = result.source;
let book_url = result.book_url;
let title = result.title || result.book_name || result.bookName;
let book_id = result.book_id || result.series_id || result.bookId;

let detail = {
    source: source,
    url: book_url,
    name: title
};

if (book_id && /^\d{19}$/.test(book_id)) {
    detail.url = java.base64Encode(`https://api5-normal-sinfonlineb.fqnovel.com/reading/bookapi/multi-detail/v/?aid=1967&iid=1&version_code=999&book_id=${book_id}`);
    detail.source = "番茄小说";
} else if (book_url) {
    detail.url = java.base64Encode(book_url);
}

let yunurl = java.base64Encode(JSON.stringify(detail));
`data:detailsUrl;base64,${yunurl},{"type":"shushan"}`;
</js>

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
let res = JSON.parse(java.hexDecodeToString(result));
let catalog = {source: res.source, url: res.url, name: res.name, tab: res.tab || "novel"};

showTabTips(catalog);

let op = {method: "POST", body: catalog};

let catalogUrl = getServerHost() + `/catalog,${JSON.stringify(op)}`;
let response = java.ajax(catalogUrl);
// java.log(response);

let device = deviceType() ? 'android' : 'ios';

if (device == 'android') {
    var typeMap = {audio:32, comic:64};
    book.type = catalog.tab in typeMap ? typeMap[catalog.tab] : 8;
} else {
    var typeMap = {audio:1, comic:2, video:3};
    book.type = catalog.tab in typeMap ? typeMap[catalog.tab] : 0;
}

JSON.parse(response).data.map((x) => {
    if (x.isVolume == true) {
        x.url = "";
        return x;
    }
    
    x.url = buildChapterUrl(x, catalog, device);
    return x;
});
</js>

<js>
if (!getSecretKey()) {
    java.toast("请登录后使用");
    result = "[]";
} else {
    let config = (() => {
        try {
            let cfg = JSON.parse(source.getVariable())[0] || {};
            if (!cfg.host || !cfg.gender) {
                cfg = {gender: "boy", host: getServerHost()};
                source.setVariable(JSON.stringify([cfg]));
                java.toast("配置初始化完成");
            }
            return cfg;
        } catch(e) {
            let cfg = {gender: "boy", host: getServerHost()};
            source.setVariable(JSON.stringify([cfg]));
            return cfg;
        }
    })();

    var sourceVal = '';
    var customSource = '';

    try {
        customSource = (source.getLoginInfoMap())['自定义源站'];
    } catch(e) {
        customSource = '';
    }

    if (customSource !== undefined && customSource !== null && String(customSource).trim() !== "") {
        sourceVal = String(customSource).trim();
    } else if (config.source) {
        sourceVal = config.source;
    }

    var param = sourceVal ? '&source=' + encodeURIComponent(sourceVal) : '';

    result = buildSearchResult(key, param, getServerHost());
}
</js>

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
var pages = java.getElements('tag.select@option');
pages = Math.floor(pages.length / 2);
java.log("pages: " + pages);
var res = [];
var set = {}; // 去重

for (let i = 1; i <= pages; i ++) {
  var url = baseUrl.replace('/1/', '/' + i + '/');
  var resp = java.ajax(url);
  java.setContent(resp);
  resp = java.getStringList('//ul[@class="section-list fix ycxsid"]/li/a');

  for (let j = 0; j < resp.length; j ++) {
    var rr = resp[j].match(/<a href="(.*?)">(.*?)<\/a>/);
    var title = rr[2], href = rr[1];
    if (set[title]) continue;
    var order = href.match(/\/(\d+)\.html/)[1];
    res.push(JSON.stringify({ title, href, order }));
    set[title] = true;
  }
}
res.sort((a, b) => {
  a = JSON.parse(a);
  b = JSON.parse(b);
  return a.order - b.order;
});
res;
</js>

ruleContent.content:
<js>
var bes = result.match(/PHA\+[A-Za-z0-9+\/]+={0,2}/g);
if (!bes) {
    var ml = java.webView(null,baseUrl,null);
    java.setContent(ml)
    var txt = java.getString(".word_read>p@text");
    java.longToast("正文解密失败，转为webView动态加载。");
} else {
var result = [];
for (var i = 0; i < bes.length; i++) {
    // 遍历数组，使用阅读内置Base64解码方法
    var bsej = java.base64Decode(bes[i]);
    var txtt = String(bsej);
    result.push(txtt);
      }
	var txt = result.join('\n');
}
txt;
</js>

ruleBookInfo.init:
<js>
var J = org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(result);
var og = (selector) =>
  J.select('[property="og:' + selector + '"]').attr('content');

var book = {
  name: og('novel:book_name'),
  author: og('novel:author'),
  kind: og('novel:category') + ',' + og('novel:status'),
  latest: og('novel:latest_chapter_name') + ' • ' + String(og('novel:update_time')).replace(/(\d+:\d+)/,''),
  cover: og('image').replace('https','http'),
  wordCount: J.select('.layui-bg-red').text(),
  intro: J.select('.intro p').eq(0).html(),
  url:og('novel:read_url').replace('m.','www.')
};

book;
</js>

tag_id=baseUrl.match(/tag_id=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/tag_id=(\d+)/)[1]:""
sign_key='d3dGiJc651gSQ8w1'
headers={'app-version':'51110','platform':'android','reg':'0','AUTHORIZATION':'','application-id':'com.****.reader','net-env':'1','channel':'unknown','qm-params':''}
headers['sign']=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(headers).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+headers[n],'')+sign_key))


var urlEncode = function (param, key, encode) {
  if(param==null) return '';
  var paramStr = '';
  var t = typeof (param);
  if (t == 'string' || t == 'number' || t == 'boolean') {
    paramStr += '&' + key + '=' + ((encode==null||encode) ? encodeURIComponent(param) : param);
  } else {
    for (var i in param) {
      var k = key == null ? i : key + (param instanceof Array ? '[' + i + ']' : '.' + i);
      paramStr += urlEncode(param[i], k, encode);
    }
  }
  return paramStr;
};

var category = function () {
  params={'gender':gender,'category_id':category_id,'need_filters':need_filters,'page':page,'need_category':need_category}
  params['sign']=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(params).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+params[n],'')+sign_key))
  url="https://api-bc.wtzw.com/api/v4/category/get-list?"+urlEncode(params)
  return java.ajax(url+','+java.put("headers",JSON.stringify({"headers":headers})))
};

var tag = function () {
  params={'gender':gender,'need_filters':need_filters,'page':page,'tag_id':tag_id}
  params['sign']=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(params).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+params[n],'')+sign_key))
  url="https://api-bc.wtzw.com/api/v4/tag/index?"+urlEncode(params)
  return java.ajax(url+','+java.put("headers",JSON.stringify({"headers":headers})))
};


if(baseUrl.match(/category/)){
  category()
}else {
  tag()
}
</js>

ruleExplore.bookList:
<js>
gender=baseUrl.match(/gender=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/gender=(\d+)/)[1]:""
category_id=baseUrl.match(/category_id=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/category_id=(\d+)/)[1]:""
need_filters=baseUrl.match(/need_filters=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/need_filters=(\d+)/)[1]:""
page=baseUrl.match(/page=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/page=(\d+)/)[1]:""
need_category=baseUrl.match(/need_category=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/need_category=(\d+)/)[1]:""
tag_id=baseUrl.match(/tag_id=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/tag_id=(\d+)/)[1]:""
sign_key='d3dGiJc651gSQ8w1'
headers={'app-version':'51110','platform':'android','reg':'0','AUTHORIZATION':'','application-id':'com.****.reader','net-env':'1','channel':'unknown','qm-params':''}
headers['sign']=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(headers).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+headers[n],'')+sign_key))


var urlEncode = function (param, key, encode) {
  if(param==null) return '';
  var paramStr = '';
  var t = typeof (param);
  if (t == 'string' || t == 'number' || t == 'boolean') {
    paramStr += '&' + key + '=' + ((encode==null||encode) ? encodeURIComponent(param) : param);
  } else {
    for (var i in param) {
      var k = key == null ? i : key + (param instanceof Array ? '[' + i + ']' : '.' + i);
      paramStr += urlEncode(param[i], k, encode);
    }
  }
  return paramStr;
};

var category = function () {
  params={'gender':gender,'category_id':category_id,'need_filters':need_filters,'page':page,'need_category':need_category}
  params['sign']=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(params).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+params[n],'')+sign_key))
  url="https://api-bc.wtzw.com/api/v4/category/get-list?"+urlEncode(params)
  return java.ajax(url+','+java.put("headers",JSON.stringify({"headers":headers})))
};

var tag = function () {
  params={'gender':gender,'need_filters':need_filters,'page':page,'tag_id':tag_id}
  params['sign']=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(params).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+params[n],'')+sign_key))
  url="https://api-bc.wtzw.com/api/v4/tag/index?"+urlEncode(params)
  return java.ajax(url+','+java.put("headers",JSON.stringify({"headers":headers})))
};


if(baseUrl.match(/category/)){
  category()
}else {
  tag()
}
</js>
